join_order.build: qualifying_orderkeys(lineitem GROUP BY l_orderkey HAVING SUM(l_quantity) > 300, with sum_qty carried)
join_order.notes: Probe orders_pk_hash for sparse qualifying keys; carry precomputed sum_qty to avoid re-reading lineitem
Probe customer_pk_hash to attach c_name/c_custkey payload

optimization_notes: Root cause is a parallelism/plan mismatch: dim_filter dominates (222ms of ~310ms) due to a single-thread full scan over 59,986,052 lineitem rows (~720MB sequential read), while later phases are minor. Strategy categories D+A: parallelize the lineitem grouped reduction by partitioning scan work across threads with boundary-safe segment merge, and eliminate redundant work by reusing Phase-A per-order sum_qty in the final projection instead of a second lineitem join/probe pass.
